ddt:Target.Name: N_P32M_ECM_TR25_20080313
ddt:Target.Description:
[N]Initial Create: 2003/10/06 NISSAN KR6 K.Asami 2003/10/06 NISSAN KR6 K.Konishi
[1]Add "CAN DIAG SUPPORT MNTR.can" Add ReadFreezeFrameData 2003/10/15 NISSAN KR6 K.Asami
[2]Add readVIN 2003/10/17 NISSAN KR6 K.Yamauchi
[3]Mod ReadDTC Mod Nissan's system identifier 2004/01/14 NISSAN KR6 K.Konishi
[4]Correcting and Adding: 2004/11/22 KR6 K.Yamauchi Adding : - FFD reading Correcting : - I/O request - Routine request
[5]Correcting 2005/1/12 KR6 K.Yamauchi - Parameter format of WBDLID LID$02 - Parameter format of IOBCLID LID$0C
[6]Add CID, IOLID, WDBLID, SRBLID 2006/10/5 NISSAN XX4 G.Miwa
[7]Corrected in P32M 2006/10/05 XX4 K.Konishi
[8]Correcting 2006/10/19 XX4 G.Miwa g-miwa@mail.nissan.co.jp
[9]Add VINservice, Auto-identification
[10] Modify firstdtc for P32M
[11] Correcting 2007/01/09 Devices for P32M WriteVIN
[12] Modify for Naming Rule Bug 2007/6/12 G.Miwa
[13] Delete not supported item 2007/6/26 G.Miwa
[14] Add RDBLID $21,$22 2007/7/5 G.Miwa (g-miwa@mail.nissan.co.jp)
[15] Modify System ID Reading, Add Tracability LID($84) 2007/7/28 G.Miwa (g-miwa@mail.nissan.co.jp)
[16]Modify Tracability LID($84) 2007/7/30
[17] 2007/09/05 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida Supported Lid for was modified. LID was delete. Data was added. 2007/09/05 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida [[2.17]]
[18] 2007/09/06 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida Request (2121) was modified. 2007/09/06 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida [[2.17]]
[19] 2007/10/17 NISSAN XX4 T.Matsuoka Add DTCcodes(Devices) [[2.17]]
[20] 2008/3/12 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida Device data is unused space deleted. StartDiagnosticsession was added. Request send bytes was modified. Request recived data was modified. OutPutControle request(61 and 62 and 63) divided. [[2.17]]

Data.Name: LUCS1
Data.Comment: Lock up cancel solenoid function diagnosis

Data.Name: CVBV1
Data.Comment: Check valve bypass valve function diagnosis

Data.Name: FO2OP2-1
Data.Comment: Front O2/S breaking of a wire diagnosis (BANK2)

Data.Name: FO2OP1-1
Data.Comment: Front O2/S breaking of a wire diagnosis (BANK1)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Routine Entry Status
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Data.Name: Routine Entry Option
Data.Comment: Routine entry option for request data

Data.Name: RSDTC.1.Type of fault
Data.Comment: for standard list value of type of faults

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to battery

Data.Comment: Front A/F sensor response inferior/ middle electric potential diagnosis area (BANK1)

Data.Comment: Front A/F sensor response inferior/ middle electric potential diagnosis area (BANK2)

Data.Comment: Third O2/S fuel cut delay experience (BANK1)

Data.Name: CID=1512H_FAFB11
Data.Comment: Front A/F sensor breaking of a wire diagnosis territory1 (BANK1)

Data.Name: CID=1513H_EGRPC
Data.Comment: Pressure type EGR flux diagnosis territory

Data.Name: CID=150AH_RO2B11
Data.Comment: Rear O2/S DOS area delay experience (BANK1)

Data.Comment: Rear O2/S fuel cut delay experience (BANK1)

Data.Comment: Rear O2/S DOS area delay experience (BANK2)

Data.Comment: Rear O2/S fuel cut delay experience (BANK2)

Data.Comment: Third O2/S fuel cut delay experience (BANK2)

Data.Name: CID=1509H_FO2B11

Data.Comment: Front O2/S abnormal voltage diagnosis area (BANK1)

Data.Comment: Front O2/S breaking of a wire diagnosis area (BANK2)

Data.Name: CID=1509H_FO2B22
Data.Comment: Front O2/S abnormal voltage diagnosis area (BANK2)

Data.Name: CID=1505H_CVBV
Data.Comment: Check bypass valve function diagnosis result

Data.Comment: Check valve bypass valve function diagnosis area

Data.Name: CID=1505H_LUCS
Data.Comment: Lock up cancel solenoid function diagnosis result

Data.Name: CID=1505H_PCONTV
Data.Comment: Purge control valve function diagnosis result

Data.Comment: Purge cut valve function diagnosis result

Data.Comment: Front O2/S breaking of a wire diagnosis result (BANK1)

Data.Comment: Front O2/S lean shift diagnosis result (BANK2)

Data.Comment: Front O2/S lean shift diagnosis result (BANK1)

Data.Comment: Front O2/S rich shift diagnosis result (BANK2)

Data.Comment: Front O2/S rich shift diagnosis result (BANK1)

V Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to battery

Data.Name: diag. byte stored upoon receptioon of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
diag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal deactivations due to system causes.
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal causes of deactivation

Transmission ratio for manual gearbox calculated by the engine control unit
Carrier of all the failures which cause CC failure
Carrier of all the failures which cause CC/SL failure
Maximum duration of RESUME button press
Maximum duration of SET- buttion press
Maximum duration of SET+ buttion press
Maximum duration of SUSPEND button press
Maximum value of counter for detection of blocked button
Input of the cruise control and speed limiter steering wheel push buttons (msb)
Input of the cruise control and speed limiter steering wheel push buttons (lsb)
Bit indicating that the lmmobiiiser diagnosis is available
immobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to a CAN network problem with BCM
immobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to ECM
immobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM secure mode
immobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to no BCM authorization
connection status with ECU n 1(engine controle unit) only for LPG ECU
diag byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
High speed engine fan delayed command
Low speed engine fan delayed command
Fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine manegement
Fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine manegement
Air conditionning pressure detection . Stored in E2PROM
Air conditionning pressure sensor short circuit memorised failuer
Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failuer
Air conditionning pressure sensor short circuit detected failuer
Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit detected failuer
Relative air conditioning pressure for diagnosis
Diesel Pre heating lamp command Prechout
'connection status with ECU n 1(engine controle unit) only for LPG ECU
